okf_version: '0.1'

# knowledge

Fixture bundle for the cards-view e2e suite. Root links feed the
synthetic root card: concepts directly, sub-bundles as dir cards.

## Concepts

* [Both E](both-e.md) - Mutual link with the hub; lands in the in-row with a two-way arrow.
* [Focus Hub](hub.md) - The decision everything orbits.
* [In A](in-a.md) - Links into the hub; ring-2 parent above.
* [In B](in-b.md) - Second in-link to the hub.
* [In2 F](in2-f.md) - Ring-2 above; links into In A.
* [Island](island.md) - Connected to nothing; must never appear in a card layout.
* [Out C](out-c.md) - Hub links out to this; ring-2 parent below. Hideable type.
* [Out D](out-d.md) - Leaf out-link of the hub.
* [Out2 G](out2-g.md) - Ring-2 below; Out C links here.

## Subdirectories

* [decisions](decisions/index.md)
* [experiments](experiments/index.md)
* [glossary](glossary/index.md)
* [notes](notes/index.md) - Side notes sub-bundle — exists so the root card view gets a dir card.
* [patterns](patterns/index.md)
* [playbooks](playbooks/index.md)
* [references](references/index.md)
* [runbooks](runbooks/index.md)
* [services](services/index.md)
